text: "Information supplied by a person in custody that 'I will produce a knife concealed in the roof of my house' leads to the discovery of the fact that a knife is concealed in the house of the informant to his knowledge, and if the knife is proved to have been used in the commission of the offence., the fact discovered is very relevant. If however to the statement the words be added with which I stabbed A', these words are inadmissible since they do not relate to the discovery of the knife in the house of the informant."
